message:
🐛 Fix Copilot review follow-ups: duplicate test files + wrong mock paths (#10793)

* 🐛 Fix Copilot review follow-ups: duplicate test files + wrong mock paths

- Remove useUsers.test.ts (superseded by useUsers.core.test.ts +
  useUsers.coverage.test.ts from PR #10764)
- Remove useSearchIndex.test.ts (superseded by useSearchIndex.categories.test.ts +
  useSearchIndex.results.test.ts from PR #10772)
  These files were left behind when the splits were merged, causing
  Vitest to run every test twice and inflate test counts.

- Fix vitess_status.test.tsx mock paths:
  - vi.mock('./CardDataContext') → vi.mock('../CardDataContext')
  - vi.mock('../../ui/SkeletonCardWithRefresh') → vi.mock('../../ui/Skeleton')
  These mismatched the actual import paths in index.tsx, so the mocks
  were no-ops and tests were hitting real implementations.

- Fix cni_status.test.tsx mock shape:
  mockUseCachedCni was returning legacy shape (plugin, nodeStatus) instead
  of the current useCachedCni() return shape (data, showSkeleton,
  showEmptyState, error). Updated setup() to return correct shape and
  renamed test descriptions to match the actual control flow.

Addresses Copilot review comments on PRs #10764, #10772, #10779.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vitess mock path SkeletonCardWithRefresh → Skeleton + adopt #10786 fixes

Also incorporate correct data shapes from PR #10786 for cni_status tests.
Fixes the remaining SkeletonCardWithRefresh path that PR #10786 missed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
